# World Leaders Current

> Current heads of state and government for ASEAN + G20 countries.
> Updated daily from Wikidata and Wikipedia.
> License: CC-BY-SA-4.0

## Navigation

- Root: README.md — Quick reference table of all leaders
- Data: data/current/all-leaders.json — All leaders in JSON
- Countries: data/countries/{country}/README.md — Per-country bilingual pages
- Regions: data/by-region/{region}/README.md — Regional groupings
- Changes: data/changes/README.md — Leadership change log
- Full summary: docs/llms-full.txt — Comprehensive data dump

## Countries Covered (30)

### ASEAN (10)
- Brunei
- Cambodia
- Indonesia
- Laos
- Malaysia
- Myanmar
- Philippines
- Singapore
- Thailand
- Vietnam


### G20 (unique, + EU, African Union)
- Indonesia
- Argentina
- Australia
- Brazil
- Canada
- China
- France
- Germany
- India
- Italy
- Japan
- Mexico
- Russia
- Saudi Arabia
- South Africa
- South Korea
- Turkey
- United Kingdom
- United States
- European Union
- African Union


## Quick Data

- Brunei: HoG=Hassanal Bolkiah, HoS=Hassanal Bolkiah
- Cambodia: HoG=Hun Manet, HoS=Norodom Sihamoni
- Indonesia: HoG=Prabowo Subianto, HoS=Prabowo Subianto
- Laos: HoG=Sonexay Siphandone, HoS=Thongloun Sisoulith
- Malaysia: HoG=Anwar Ibrahim, HoS=Anwar Ibrahim
- Myanmar: HoG=?, HoS=Min Aung Hlaing
- Philippines: HoG=Bongbong Marcos, HoS=Bongbong Marcos
- Singapore: HoG=Lawrence Wong, HoS=Tharman Shanmugaratnam
- Thailand: HoG=Anutin Charnvirakul, HoS=Vajiralongkorn
- Vietnam: HoG=Lê Minh Hưng, HoS=Tô Lâm
- Argentina: HoG=Javier Milei, HoS=Javier Milei
- Australia: HoG=Anthony Albanese, HoS=Charles III
- Brazil: HoG=Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, HoS=Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva
- Canada: HoG=Mark Carney, HoS=Charles III
- China: HoG=Li Qiang, HoS=Xi Jinping
- France: HoG=Sébastien Lecornu, HoS=Emmanuel Macron
- Germany: HoG=Friedrich Merz, HoS=Frank-Walter Steinmeier
- India: HoG=Narendra Modi, HoS=Droupadi Murmu
- Italy: HoG=Giorgia Meloni, HoS=Sergio Mattarella
- Japan: HoG=Sanae Takaichi, HoS=Naruhito
- Mexico: HoG=Claudia Sheinbaum, HoS=Claudia Sheinbaum
- Russia: HoG=Mikhail Mishustin, HoS=Vladimir Putin
- Saudi Arabia: HoG=Mohammed bin Salman, HoS=Mohammed bin Salman
- South Africa: HoG=Cyril Ramaphosa, HoS=Cyril Ramaphosa
- South Korea: HoG=Lee Jae Myung, HoS=Lee Jae Myung
- Turkey: HoG=Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, HoS=Recep Tayyip Erdoğan
- United Kingdom: HoG=Keir Starmer, HoS=Charles III
- United States: HoG=Donald Trump, HoS=Donald Trump
- European Union: HoG=Ursula von der Leyen, HoS=António Costa
- African Union: HoG=Mahamoud Ali Youssouf, HoS=Évariste Ndayishimiye
